Part.Source:
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, (tmpNfeItmCod) Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &UltimoPedItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod Exit EndFor
For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
&EmpCod = tmpEmpCod &FilCod = tmpFilCod &PedCod = tmpPedCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = tmpEmpCod Where FilCod = tmpFilCod Where PedCod = tmpPedCod
&FilCidUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod
&LctDesFun = LctDesFun &LctPerCred = LctPerCred &PedObsNfe = PedObsNfe &PedCliObsNfe = PedCliObsNfe
&LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod If not PedPrpCidUfeCod.IsEmpty() &PedCliCidUfeCod = PedPrpCidUfeCod Else &PedCliCidUfeCod = PedCliCidUfeCod EndIf &PedCliGruImpCod = PedCliGruImpCod
&LctTip = LctTip &PedNum = PedNum Exit EndFor
Do Case Case tmpNfeIndPres = '1' // Indicado Presencial /o ciente vira o endereço da filial se não mantem o UF do cliente &PedCliCidUfeCod = &FilCidUfeCod
EndCase
&FatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod do 'getDadosFilialFaturamento'
&tmpNfeDesImp = tmpNfeDesImp &FilBasImp = RetornaFilialBaseImposto.Udp(&EmpCod, &FatFilCod) &tmpNfeVlrFrt = tmpNfeVlrFrt
&tmpNfePerDsc = tmpNfePerDsc &tmpNfeVlrDsc = tmpNfeVlrDsc
&tmpTipDesc = tmpTipDesc &tmpNfeVlrBrtNot = tmpNfeVlrBrtNot
tmpTotPro = 0 tmpTotBasIcm = 0 tmpTotVlrIcm = 0 tmpTotBasSt = 0 tmpVlrSt = 0 tmpTotFrt = tmpNfeVlrFrt //tmpTotSeg //tmpTotOut //tmpTotDsc = 0 //tmpTotPed tmpTotIpi = 0
//TOTAL NOTA tmpTotNFe = 0
Exit EndFor
commit
&DescontoUnitarioGlobal = 0 if &tmpNfeVlrDsc > 0 and &tmpNfeVlrBrtNot > 0 &DescontoUnitarioGlobal = &tmpNfeVlrDsc/&tmpNfeVlrBrtNot &tmpNfeVlrBrtNot -= &tmpNfeVlrDsc Endif
&valorGlobalFrete = 0 if &tmpNfeVlrFrt > 0 and &tmpNfeVlrBrtNot > 0 &valorGlobalFrete = &tmpNfeVlrFrt/&tmpNfeVlrBrtNot Endif
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod or &tmpNfeItmCod = 0
&PedItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod &tmpProCod = tmpProCod For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod //FOR PRODUTO Where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = tmpProCod &ImpCatCod = ProCatCod &ProOriTriCod = ProOriTriCod
if ProPesLiq > 0 &tmpPedQtdTrib = ProPesLiq Else &tmpPedQtdTrib = ProPesLiqCal EndIf
Exit EndFor
&tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt &PedVlrUntDsc = &tmpPedVlrUnt
do 'CalculaValorUnitarioTotal'
&AuxtmpPedVlrDsc = round(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrDsc, 2) //DESCONTO tmpPedVlrDsc = &AuxtmpPedVlrDsc
do 'tabImposto' if &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra//DEVOLUCAO COMPRA //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.SitCod = SitCod //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod = ImpCfoCod //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = ImpAlqMVA &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = tmpProPerIcm //ICMS //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = ImpRedAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = tmpProPerIcmSt //ICMS S.T &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = tmpImpAlqIcmStUFDest //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = ImpRedAlqIcmExt //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = ImpDif //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins = ImpCofins //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CtmpNfeCstCofins = ImpCstCofins //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis = ImpPis //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CtmpNfeCstPIS = ImpCstPis //&tmpNfeCstIpi = ImpCstIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIPI = tmpProPerIpi //IPI //&tmpCBenef = ImpCBenef Endif
tmpNfeOriCod = &ProOriTriCod tmpNfeSitCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod
tmpCFOP = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod
if &sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod in (domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST02,domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST15, domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST53, domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.cst61) tmpPedQtdTrib = &tmpPedQtdTrib
&tmpProBasVlrIcm = ROUND(tmpPedQtdTrib * tmpPedQtdFat, 2) Else &tmpProBasVlrIcm = ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2) - tmpPedVlrDsc Endif
&sdtImpostoProduto = new() &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcmSt = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIpi = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasPis = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasCofins = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorTotalProduto = &tmpProBasVlrIcm // TOTAL PRODUTO
tmpNfeMotDesIcms = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes do 'CalculaRateioFrete' //#ICMS #ICMS ST #IPI #PIS #COFINS CalculaImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtImpostoProduto)
tmpProVlrFrt = &tmpProVlrFrt //round(&tmpProVlrFrt * tmpPedQtdFat, 2) //FRETE
if not &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes.IsEmpty() tmpProBasVlrIcm = 0//BASE ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerRedIcm = 0//RED.ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerIcm = 0//ALIQ. ICMS tmpProVlrIcm = 0//R$ ICMS tmpProVlrIcmsDes = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcm Else tmpProBasVlrIcm = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm //BASE ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerRedIcm = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt //RED.ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerIcm = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt //ALIQ. ICMS tmpProVlrIcm = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcm //R$ ICMS tmpProVlrIcmsDes = 0 Endif
//DIFERIMENTO tmpProPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif tmpProVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrDif
//FECOP tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasFCPIcmsSt tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrFCPIcmsSt
tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcmSt //BASE ALIQ. ICMS S.T tmpProPerRedIcmSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt tmpProPerIcmSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt //% ICMS S.T tmpProVlrIcmSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcmSt //R$ ICMS S.T tmpImpAlqIcmStUFDest = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF
tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA
tmpProBasVlrIpi = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIpi //BASE IPI tmpProPerIpi = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIPI //% IPI tmpProVlrIpi = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIpi //R$ IPI //NfsIpiCST = '99'
tmpProBasPIS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasPIS tmpProPerRedPis = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPisRed tmpProPerPIS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis //% PIS tmpProVlrPIS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrPIS //R$ PIS tmpNfeCstPIS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstPISCofins //&CST='01'
tmpProBasCofins = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasCofins tmpProPerRedCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofinsRed tmpProPerCOFINS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins //% COFINS tmpProVlrCOFINS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrCOFINS //R$ COFINS tmpNfeCstCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCstCofins //&CST='01'
tmpPedVlrUntNov = &tmpPedVlrUntNov //UNIT. NOTA tmpPedVlrTotNov = ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2) //TOTAL NOTA UNIT. &tmpPedVlrTotNov = ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2) //TOTAL NOTA UNIT.
//IBS E CBS tmpNfeIbsSit = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST tmpNfeIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib
//Retido tmpNfeRegIbsSit = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsSit tmpNfeRegIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsClassTrib
tmpNfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe tmpNfeRegIbsUfeVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsUfeVlr tmpNfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe tmpNfeRegIbsMunVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsMunVlr tmpNfeRegCbsTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegCbsTaxEfe tmpNfeRegCbsVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegCbsVlr
tmpNfeIbsBas = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorBaseIbsCbs
tmpNfeIbsUfPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTax tmpNfeIbsUfPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs tmpNfeIbsUfPerEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTaxEfe tmpNfeIbsUfVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsUf
tmpNfeIbsMunPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTax tmpNfeIbsMunPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs tmpNfeIbsMunVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsMun tmpNfeIbsMunEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTaxEfe
tmpNfeCbsPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTax tmpNfeCbsPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedCbs tmpNfeCbsPerEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTaxEfe tmpNfeCbsVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorCbs
//diferido tmpNfeIbsUfPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsUfPerDif tmpNfeIbsUfVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsUfVlrDif tmpNfeIbsMunPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsMunPerDif tmpNfeIbsMunVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsMunVlrDif tmpNfeCbsPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCbsPerDif tmpNfeCbsVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeCbsVlrDif
//tmpPedVlrDscAux = &PedVlrUntDsc - &tmpPedVlrUntNov //If tmpPedVlrDscAux < 0 // tmpPedVlrDscAux = tmpPedVlrDscAux * -1 //EndIF &NcmCod = tmpNcmCod do 'CalucloImpostoAproximado' tmpProVlrApxImp = &tmpProVlrApxImp
EndFor
commit
For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
tmpTotPro += tmpPedVlrTotNov tmpTotBasIcm += tmpProBasVlrIcm tmpTotVlrIcm += tmpProVlrIcm tmpTotBasSt += tmpProBasVlrIcmSt tmpVlrSt += tmpProVlrIcmSt &tmpTotVlrFcp += tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt If &tmpNfeDesImp <> true //NAO DESTACAR O DESCONTO NA NFE tmpTotDsc = 0 Else if &tmpTipDesc = 'P' //DESCONTOS EM % if &tmpNfePerDsc > 0 tmpTotDsc = round(((tmpTotPro * &tmpNfePerDsc) / 100), 2) EndIF Else //DESCONTO EM VALORES R$ tmpTotDsc = &tmpNfeVlrDsc Endif EndIF
//Calcula Funrural If &FilPerFun > 0 &tmpTotFun = (tmpTotPro * (&FilPerFun/100)) If &LctDesFun = Status_simNao.Sim and &tmpTotFun > 0 // Se Destacar vai somar nos descontos para/descontar do valor total da nota. tmpTotDsc += &tmpTotFun EndIf EndIf
tmpTotFun = &tmpTotFun tmpTotIpi += tmpProVlrIpi
//TOTAL NOTA tmpTotNFe = round((tmpTotPro + tmpVlrSt + tmpTotIpi + tmpTotPed + tmpTotSeg + tmpTotOut + tmpTotFrt + &tmpTotVlrFcp) - tmpTotDsc, 2) EndFor
commit
For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
if not tmpTotApxImp.IsEmpty() &Percentual = round((tmpTotApxImp / tmpTotPro) * 100,2) &impostoAproximado = 'LEI 12.741/12, VALOR APROX.TRIB:R$' + trim(toformattedString(tmpTotApxImp)) + ' (' + trim(ToformattedString(&Percentual)) + '%)' RetornaConfSistema.Call(tmpEmpCod, tmpFilCod, domConfSistema.TCon084_ImpostoAproximado, &TCon084_ImpostoAproximado) If &TCon084_ImpostoAproximado = 'S' &impostoAproximado += ' FONTE:IBPT' Else &impostoAproximado += ' FONTE:SIMPLES NACIONAL' EndIf EndIF
If &FilCrdIcm <> 0 AND &LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaAlgumProdutoCom101_temporaria.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &FilCrdIcm, &ValorCredito)
if &ValorCredito > 0 &tmpAutNfeDadAdi = ' PERMITE O APROVEITAMENTO DO CREDITO DE ICMS NO VALOR DE R$' &tmpAutNfeDadAdi += trim(ToFormattedString(&ValorCredito))+ ' CORRESPONDENTE A ALIQUOTA DE '+trim(ToFormattedString(&FilCrdIcm)) &tmpAutNfeDadAdi += '% ARTIGO 23 DA LC.123' Endif EndIF
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod If tmpProVlrDif <> 0 &TotalDiferido += tmpProVlrDif &TotalBaseDiferido += tmpProVlrIcm + tmpProVlrDif EndIF EndFor
&DadosDiferimento = ''
If &TotalDiferido > 0 and &TotalBaseDiferido > 0 &Taxa = round(((&TotalDiferido / &TotalBaseDiferido) * 100), 2)
&DadosDiferimento = ' OPERACAO COM DIFERIMENTO' If &Taxa < 99.99 &DadosDiferimento += ' PARCIAL' EndIF &DadosDiferimento += ' DO IMPOSTO NO VALOR DE R$' &DadosDiferimento += trim(toFormattedString(&TotalDiferido)) + ' (' + trim(toformattedString(&Taxa)) &DadosDiferimento += '% de R$' + trim(toformattedString(&TotalBaseDiferido) ) + ')' EndIF
tmpAutNfeDadAdi = '' if &PedNum > 0 tmpAutNfeDadAdi = 'ORDEM/PEDIDO COMPRA: ' + trim(str(&PedNum)) EndIF
tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&impostoAproximado) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&ObservacoesCFOP) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&DadosDiferimento) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&PedObsNfe) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&PedCliObsNfe) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() EndFor
commit
Sub 'CalucloImpostoAproximado' &tmpProVlrApxImp = 0
If &LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria &AliTaxa = RetornaTaxaNCM.UDP(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&FilCidUfeCod, &NcmCod)
If not &AliTaxa.IsEmpty() &tmpProVlrApxImp = round((&tmpPedVlrTotNov-&AuxtmpPedVlrDsc) * (&AliTaxa / 100), 2) EndIF EndIF EndSub
Sub 'CalculaRateioFrete' //FRETE &tmpProVlrFrt = 0
if &PedItmCod = &UltimoPedItmCod and &tmpNfeItmCod = 0 and &UltimoPedItmCod > 0 &tmpProVlrFrt = &tmpNfeVlrFrt - &AuxNfeProVlrFrt Else &tmpProVlrFrt = round((&sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm * &valorGlobalFrete), 2) &AuxNfeProVlrFrt += &tmpProVlrFrt Endif EndSub
Sub 'CalculaValorUnitarioTotal' &tmpPedVlrUntNov = &PedVlrUntDsc
if &tmpTipDesc = 'P' //DESCONTOS EM % If &tmpNfeDesImp <> true //NAO DESTACAR O DESCONTO NA NFE &tmpPedVlrUntNov = &tmpPedVlrUntNov - round(((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &tmpNfePerDsc) / 100), 5) &tmpPedVlrDsc = 0 Else &tmpPedVlrDsc = round(((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &tmpNfePerDsc) / 100), 5) EndIF
Else //DESCONTO EM VALORES R$ If &tmpNfeDesImp <> true //NAO DESTACAR O DESCONTO NA NFE &tmpPedVlrUntNov = &tmpPedVlrUntNov - round((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &DescontoUnitarioGlobal), 5) &tmpPedVlrDsc = 0 Else &tmpPedVlrDsc = round((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &DescontoUnitarioGlobal), 5) EndIF Endif EndSub
sub 'tabImposto'
RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &CImpOriUfeCod) &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &FilBasImp &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &LctBasImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &PedCliCidUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &PedCliGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.ProCod = &tmpProCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IsRetornarObs = true //retornar obs prcRetornaConfiguracaoImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs)
For &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsobservacao in &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.observacao if &obscod(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsobservacao.ObsCod) = 0 &ObservacoesCFOP += ' '+ trim(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsobservacao.ObsNom) &obscod(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsobservacao.ObsCod) = 1 EndIf EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getDadosFilialFaturamento' //DADOS DO CREDITO EH DA FILIAL MESMO DE FATURAMENTO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FatFilCod &FilCrdIcm = FilCrdIcm &FilPerFun = FilPerFun Exit EndFor EndSub
